title: Frosted Axis
description: Frosted Axis is a NeoForge 1.21.1, winter-themed Create-heavy modpack that blends industrial automation (trains/cannons), harsher cold survival, richer worldgen, and polished immersive performance.
body:
## FROSTED AXIS

Frosted Axis is a cinematic NeoForge 1.21.1 experience where winter is not just scenery — it is a constant pressure. Snow accumulates, storms roll in, and the world grows colder, denser, and more alive with every step.

You are placed in a landscape reshaped by Terralith, Tectonic, and Lithosphere. Survival is deliberate and demanding, built around planning, efficient resource management, and long-term expansion driven by mechanical ambition.

At its core, Frosted Axis is a Create-driven industrial sandbox. Build dynamic factories, automate complex production lines, and design scalable rail networks. Progression moves from simple, manual systems to fully developed logistics powered by trains, loaders, and advanced Create add-ons. Engineering is not a secondary feature — it is the core of your evolution.

The experience is intentionally focused. Rather than traditional exploration, the world acts as both a framework and a constraint. Its harsh terrain and complex elevation actively slow progression, forcing careful planning before expansion is even possible. Frosted Axis is centered around establishing, expanding, and optimizing an industrial base in a frozen environment that resists efficiency.

Combat remains smooth and responsive, supporting the overall gameplay without becoming the primary focus.

Behind the scenes, Frosted Axis is heavily optimized. A modern performance stack ensures smooth gameplay even with advanced visuals, dense automation systems, and large-scale terrain generation.

Frosted Axis is a cold-world engineering experience: endure the elements, master complex systems, and transform a frozen frontier into a living industrial empire.

---

## VISUAL AND IMMERSION

The pack reinforces immersion at every level. Enhanced clouds and precipitation, dynamic snow behavior, physical sound design, and refined environmental audio create a world that feels tangible. Visual improvements give each biome a distinct, handcrafted identity.

For the intended experience, it is recommended to keep shaders enabled if your system allows it. The included shader is specifically configured to provide the best balance between visual quality and performance, and using other shaders may lead to inconsistent results.

Nighttime is intentionally very dark. This is a design choice to reinforce atmosphere and immersion, not a visual issue.

---

## PERFORMANCE

**Tested configuration**

* Ryzen 9 9950X3D
* RTX 3060 12GB
* 16GB DDR5 allocated

**Recommended (with shaders at 60 fps)**

* Any modern multi-core CPU
* GPU equivalent to an RTX 3060 12GB
* Minimum 8GB of allocated RAM
